title: EIGHTREE Smart Plug with Energy Monitoring, Smart Plugs that Work with Alexa, Google Home, WiFi Smart Socket with WiFi Remote Control and Timer Function, 2.4GHz Wi-Fi Only, 13A, 4 Pack
features: APP Remote Control: Effortlessly manage your home appliances anytime, anywhere through the Smart Life APP. No more worrying about forgetting to turn off the appliances when you are out.

Voice Control: Our smart plugs are compatible with Alexa and Google Assistant, enabling you to control your home electrical devices with just your voice. Simply speak to Alexa or say "OK Google" for effortless control.

Energy Consumption Monitoring: This feature enables you to closely track your devices' energy consumption. You can access consumption statistics on a daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly basis to gain a deeper insight into and better manage the power usage.

Group Control & Device Sharing: Organize your rooms and devices into groups, allowing you to control multiple devices with a single click. Additionally, you can share your devices with your family, enabling multiple users to control a single appliance simultaneously.

Note: Please ensure that your smart plug is connected to a 2.4GHz Wi-Fi network. Our smart plugs are not compatible with 5GHz networks. If you encounter any connection issues, please get in touch with our customer service for assistance.
description: Product Description Energy Consumption Monitoring Easily track the power consumption of your home devices. Previous page Remote Control Effortlessly manage your connected devices anytime, anywhere, just the way you want. Voice Control Speak to Alexa and OK Google to achieve hands-free control of your home devices. Group Control Group your home devices to turn them all on or off with just "one click".
